# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## 1.1.0 - 2025-01-19

- *(backend)* Add renderer #42

- *(cli)* Remove legacy flag #42
- **BREAKING:** the legacy flag was removed.

- *(web)* Add browser adapter

### 🛠️ Bug Fixes

- *(parser)* Handle escaped scope

### 🚜 Refactor

- *(core)* Reorganize renderer

### 📝 Documentation

### ⚡ Performance

- *(core)* Speed up rendering

### 🎨 Styling

### 🧪 Testing

### 🧹 Chores

### 👷 CI/CD

- *(release)* Harden publishing workflow

### 🔧 Build System

- *(package)* Update bundling

### ⏪ Reverts

- *(api)* Restore stable endpoint

### 📦 Dependencies

- *(deps)* Update toolchain

- *(Unscoped)* [dependency] Update lodash 4.17.21

### 🛡️ Security

- *(auth)* Close security gap

### 🛠️ Other Changes

- *(Unscoped)* Improve assorted repository behavior
